title: Problem Discovery Before Solution Commitment · Claim Audit: Context Observation
summary: A community partner asks for an app, but the underlying decision, present workaround, affected users, frequency, severity, and evidence are unknown. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pp1 context observation increment in problem evidence dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Observe or reconstruct the current workflow with roles, triggers, inputs, handoffs, delays, exceptions, and consequences.
Separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments

steps.title: Predict Context Observation · Theory Context Observation
steps.instruction:
theory case — A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The theory variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Context Observation contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Context Observation · Theory Context Observation.

For Predict Context Observation · Theory Context Observation, keep Context Observation connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Context Observation condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: ACM IEEE AAAI Computer Science Curricula 2023 — Controls competency-based progression, project work, professional practice, ethics, accessibility, security, testing, and the integration of knowledge with observable performance.

content.text: Observe or reconstruct the current workflow with roles, triggers, inputs, handoffs, delays, exceptions, and consequences. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Context Observation while producing problem evidence dossier.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The worked example variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Observe or reconstruct the current workflow with roles, triggers, inputs, handoffs, delays, exceptions, and consequences. A defensible solution applies Context Observation, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to problem evidence dossier.

content.code:
# Worked focus: pp1-context-observation — Observe or reconstruct the current workflow with roles, triggers, inputs, handoffs, delays, exceptions, and consequences.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-5
focus: pp1-context-observation
decision-evidence: Observe or reconstruct the current workflow with roles, triggers, inputs, handoffs, delays, exceptions, and consequences.
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Observe or reconstruct the current workflow with roles, triggers, inputs, handoffs, delays, exceptions, and consequences.

steps.title: Build Context Observation evidence · Theory Context Observation
steps.instruction:
Append a pp1-context-observation-1dqutw: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.

For Build Context Observation evidence · Theory Context Observation, keep Context Observation connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Context Observation structural check is only one gate. problem evidence dossier must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

steps.title: Defend the Context Observation model · Theory Context Observation
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Context Observation: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The theory variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Observe or reconstruct the current workflow with roles, triggers, inputs, handoffs, delays, exceptions, and consequences.

Evidence target: Defend the Context Observation model · Theory Context Observation.
steps.why: Retrieving Context Observation through the concrete problem evidence dossier case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Defend the Context Observation model · Theory Context Observation, keep Context Observation connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Observe or reconstruct the current workflow with roles, triggers, inputs, handoffs, delays, exceptions, and consequences.
